subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the All-Merciful! Praise be to God that the women of 'Ishqábád have attained the station of men, which is to say, they have reached the utmost degree of detachment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اماء رحمن الحمد لله نساء عشق آباد حکم رجال یافته اند یعنی در نهایت تبتل
